# Fixture: brittney_bazan_stuck_orientation
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 33.2s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Brittney! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: Completing my orientation
Concierge: Great! The orientation is done right in the Shiftsmart app. It has 4 steps and takes about 45 minutes.
Partner: I already started it and watched the videos it won't let me proceed to the phone call
Concierge: Try closing and reopening the app. Sometimes that helps refresh things.
Partner: It still didn't work, that was the first thing I had tried.

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Tap the message icon in the top right corner of the app, then Send us a message and start a new chat. Let them know you finished the learning videos but can't get to the certification call step — they can look into your account and get you unstuck.
